LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SUSAN KOE AND PHILIP KROHN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD AT 9:30 A.M. ON APRIL 29, 2013 BECAUSE THIS CASE INVOLVES A LANDLORD/TENANT DISPUTE. THE MOVING PARTY MUST COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS SUSAN KOE AND PHILIP KROHN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED WITH LEAVE TO FILE ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED FACTS RE: CONSCIOUS DISREGARD OF PLAINTIFF'S RIGHTS. CCC 3294. PRAYER FOR PREJUDGMENT INTEREST IS NOT IMPROPER AT LEAST AS TO PURELY ECONOMIC LOSSES. CCC 3288. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE HARRY DORFMAN, CLERK: N. BAUTISTA, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Terri Anastassiou (650-364-8200) from Ropers, Majeski, Kohn, & Bentley appearing for Defendant and moving party / Atty. Navruz Avloni (415-835-6777) apperaing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

Argued - The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANTS SUSAN KOE AND PHILIP KROHN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED with leave to file answer within 10 days. Plaintiff sufficiently alleged facts re: conscious disregard of plaintiff's rights. CCC 3294. Prayer for prejudgment interest is not improper at least as to purely economic losses. CCC 3288. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Harry Dorfman, Clerk: N. Bautista, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kristen Ross, Esq. (415-835-6777) for Susan Koe and Philip Krohn, defendants and moving parties / Terry Anastacio, Esq. (650-364-8200) for Kellie Jackson, plaintiff and opposing party

HEARING - Court announces its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SUSAN KOE AND PHILIP KROHN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED as to punitive damages with leave to amend and DENIED as to the allegations during the tenancy.

Arguments are heard by Court. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT SUSAN KOE AND PHILIP KROHN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED as to punitive damages with leave to amend and DENIED as to the allegations during the tenancy. Defendant's counsel to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kristen Ross, Esq. (415-835-6777) for Susan Koe and Philip Krohn, defendants and moving parties / Terry Anastacio, Esq. (650-364-8200) for Kellie Jackson, plaintiff and opposing party

HEARING - Court announces its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SUSAN KOE AND PHILIP KROHN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to cause of action for Intentional Infliction of emotional distress; SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to cause of action for breach of contract to allege terms re: breaches alleged in paragraph 43; OVERRULED as to causes 1, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10.

Arguments are heard by Court. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SUSAN KOE AND PHILIP KROHN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to cause of action for Intentional Infliction of emotional distress; SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to cause of action for breach of contract to allege terms re: breaches alleged in paragraph 43; OVERRULED as to causes 1, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10. Defendant's counsel to prepare the order approved as to form. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs SUSAN KOE and PHILIP KROHN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on April 29, 2013 because this case involves a landlord/tenant dispute. The moving party must comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B and immediately provide a courtesy copy of its reply papers to Department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

DEFENDANTs SUSAN KOE and PHILIP KROHN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on April 29, 2013 because this case involves a landlord/tenant dispute. The moving party must comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B and immediately provide a courtesy copy of its reply papers to Department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J.
